top_signals.title: Fear of an Oil Glut May Be Overblown, Top Consultancy Says
top_signals.summary: Up to 75% of the previous oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz are expected to return to the market by the end of the year, but significantly lower oil prices aren’t guaranteed for 2027 as the ongoing U.S.-Iran tensions are unlikely to be resolved for good soon, Fereidun Fesharaki, chairman emeritus of FGE NexantECA, told CNBC on Monday. Before the Iran war, the consultancy FGE NexantECA expected oil prices to be in the upper $50s low $60s per barrel next year. This could still be the case in 2027, but it rests on the assumption that a…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
top_signals.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump's calls, Ukraine's strikes and Russia's barrage on Kyiv put markets on alert
top_signals.summary: Trump reportedly spoke with Putin and Zelenskyy as Ukraine struck Russian targets and Moscow launched another deadly attack on Kyiv.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Christine Lagarde: Back to basics in an uncertain environment
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
top_signals.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
top_signals.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
top_signals.summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
top_signals.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: QXO is taking its offer directly to shareholders after being rebuffed on several occasions.

top_signals.title: More European Investors Oppose Norway’s Push for Arctic Oil Drilling
top_signals.summary: Six more financial institutions from Northwestern Europe have voiced their opposition to plans by Norway to pursue Arctic oil drilling in a bid to boost Europe’s supply security. According to the opponents, energy transition efforts should take priority. The new opponents include Swedbank Robur Fonder AB, Sarasin & Partners LLP, French pension fund Ircantec, British West Yorkshire Pension Fund, Irish KBI Global Investors, and Swedish bank and pension fund Länsförsäkringar AB, Bloomberg reported. They join a dozen other…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

alerts.title: Natural Gas Falls on Shifting Weather Forecasts
alerts.summary: U.S. natural gas futures fell after weekend updates took some of the chill out of early February weather forecasts.
